identity.name: DEV-MOCHI
identity.manifold: Count, Measure, Language — rendered in 6 lines

vision.pitch: Stop building chatbots that forget. Dev-mochi is the structural constant — project identity anchored in every agent session.
vision.mission: Transform the status line from entertainment into a navigational engine that collapses agent drift into deterministic focus.
vision.moonshot: A self-updating project manifold that syncs across all agents, worktrees, and sessions — one config, zero probability of context loss.

stack: Node.js · Claude Code Status Line API
brief: The project IS the beast. Feed it commits, not kibble.

roadmap.current_deck: Epoch 1: Core renderer + config schema locked
milestones: Auto-populate from git history + CI status

constraints.platform: Claude Code statusline API → any terminal
